title: Colosseum: The Legendary Arena
shortWhy: Colosseum live at WXEL South Florida PBS.
editorialWhy: Colosseum: The Legendary Arena is a powerful immersive experience that transports you to ancient Rome at the height of its empire. Get your tickets! At WXEL South Florida PBS in Miami. Tickets from $25.

title: Titanic: An Immersive Voyage
shortWhy: Titanic live at WXEL South Florida PBS.
editorialWhy: 🛳️ Step aboard the Titanic and explore life-size replicas of some of the ship's parts. Get your tickets now! At WXEL South Florida PBS in Miami. Tickets from $45.
